reviews.comment:
La estación no tenía nafta cuando estuvimos pero venden un café delicioso y unas medialunas y chipa excelentes😱
Atención buena.

(Translated by Google)
The station was out of gas when we were there, but they sell delicious coffee and excellent croissants and chipa 😱
Good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXbk9QWFhREAE

reviews.comment:
Mucha gente de Brasil viene a cargar acá provocando que haya cuadras y cuadras de cola para cargar

(Translated by Google)
Many people from Brazil come to load here, causing there to be blocks and blocks of queues to load.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXck9iQVhREAE

reviews.comment:

Unfortunately they do not have fuel for foreigners.

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno.  Higiene. Atención. Cordialidad. Totalmente recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. Cleanliness. Service. Friendliness. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXa1AxShAB

reviews.comment:
Me atendieron muy bien.
Hice 2 hs y media de cola para conseguir nafta.
Es tremenda la escases que hay

(Translated by Google)
They treated me very well.
I waited in line for two and a half hours to get gas.
The shortage is tremendous.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXb012bjNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Las filas para cargar NAFTA son de 1 km. Permiten la compra de NAFTA para revender y está lleno de paraguayos y brasileros que cruzan la frontera porque les sale la mitad de precio, vacían los surtidores y la gente de la cuidad o los turistas deben estar en promedio 5 horas haciendo fila para cargar $1500 si tienen suerte de llegar al surtidor cuando aún queda algo de combustible

(Translated by Google)
The lines for gasoline are 1 km long. They allow the purchase of gasoline for resale, and it's full of Paraguayans and Brazilians who cross the border because it's half price. They empty the pumps, and locals and tourists have to wait an average of 5 hours in line to fill up for $1500 if they're lucky enough to get to the pump when there's still some fuel left.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXd05DNE9BEAE

reviews.comment:
Esta bien como todas estas estaciones.
No comparto que hay días con combustible y días sin combustible

(Translated by Google)
It's fine, like all these stations. I don't agree that there are days with fuel and days without fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbDVLckNnEAE

reviews.comment:
En esta temporada conviene cargar combustible en otros lugares más lejos porque por ahí no se consigue o hay que hacer largas colas. Lo demás normal como cualquier YPF.

(Translated by Google)
This season it's best to fill up at stations further away because fuel is unavailable locally or you have to wait in long lines. Otherwise, it's normal, just like any YPF station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbTlLM1JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Mala atención. Si no quedará tan a mano sería preferible no ir

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. If it weren't so convenient, it would be better not to go.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtb19TaVNREAE

reviews.comment:
Si tu vehículo es naftero! O a gas! Vas a tener un gran problema! Las colas para cargar nafta son kilométricas! Armate de paciencia!

(Translated by Google)
If your vehicle runs on gasoline or gas, you're going to have a big problem! The lines to fill up are miles long! Get ready to be patient!

(Translated by Google) Terrible service, I only go there for the price. And soon even the price won't be worth the humiliation of entering this country.
